nodes.label: [CE] 创建 Epics 和 Stories 工作流
nodes.norm_label: [ce] 创建 epics 和 stories 工作流

nodes.label: Emotional Vectors
nodes.rationale: Anthropic research shows 171 emotional vectors in Claude affect its behavior. Stress (desperate vector) makes it take shortcuts, while encouragement (calm vector) promotes exploration.

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.rationale: Provides project-specific instructions loaded automatically at the start of each session. Should be concise (30-100 lines) to avoid context bloat.

nodes.label: MEMORY.md
nodes.rationale: Claude's cross-session notebook. First 200 lines automatically loaded into new sessions.

nodes.label: Agent Teams
nodes.rationale: Multiple Claude instances working in parallel, communicating with each other. Useful for multi-role discussions.

nodes.label: Hooks System
nodes.rationale: Deterministic scripts triggered at specific lifecycle events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, etc.). Ensures mandatory checks are always performed.

nodes.label: Rules System
nodes.rationale: Thematic guidelines loaded automatically. Distinct from CLAUDE.md to allow modular organization.

nodes.label: Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model
nodes.norm_label: emotion concepts and their function in a large language model
